creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/docs/> includes: 

* an immediately visible link to FAQ in the sidebar
* FAQ under the Documentation menu.

<https://docs.freebsd.org/en/> does include an immediately visible link to FAQ (currently the fourth of nine cards), however: 

* neither the Documentation menu, nor the footer, mentions FAQ

– so, for example: 

* 'Getting started' lacks a link to FAQ. 

I suggest adding FAQ to both the Documentation menu, and the footer.
